content.speakerText: I need to change my flight because my mom had a sudden accident.
content.speakerTextCn: 我得改签，我妈妈突然出事故了。
expectedAnswers: My mom was rushed to the hospital — I need to be there right away.
It’s a family emergency — my mother had a stroke and I have to fly home immediately.
I have an urgent family matter: my mom’s in intensive care. Can you help me rebook?
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否明确传达了家庭突发紧急事件
语言准确性：语法正确，用词恰当（如 rushed to hospital, intensive care）
表达自然度：符合英语母语者在紧急情境下的口语表达习惯
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 family emergency, rushed, immediately, hospital 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: I need to reschedule my trip. Something urgent happened.
content.speakerTextCn: 我需要改期我的行程，发生了紧急情况。
expectedAnswers: My brother had a car accident — I need to get home tonight.
There’s been a family emergency: my grandmother passed away. I must leave as soon as possible.
I’m sorry, but I have to change my flight — my child is sick and needs me at home.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否清晰说明了突发、真实且紧迫的家庭事件
语言准确性：动词和名词搭配正确（e.g., had an accident, passed away, needs me）
表达自然度：语气真诚，符合紧急情境下的口语节奏
关键词覆盖：是否使用了 emergency, accident, sick, pass away, need to leave immediately 等关键词

content.speakerText: Can you help me change my flight? I have an emergency.
content.speakerTextCn: 你能帮我改签吗？我有急事。
expectedAnswers: Yes, it’s urgent — my mother just had surgery and I need to be with her.
I’m flying home because my father is in the ICU. I have no time to waste.
Family emergency: my daughter was in an accident. I need to catch the earliest flight available.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：是否将模糊的‘emergency’转化为具体、可信的事件
语言准确性：使用了正确医疗术语（surgery, ICU, accident）和时间表达（earliest flight）
表达自然度：语气急迫但礼貌，符合服务场景中的沟通规范
关键词覆盖：是否包含 surgery, ICU, accident, earliest flight, family emergency 等核心词汇
